THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMBRUSCHINI, LYNNE $703.50 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $808.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
